title: AI Engineer

company_hook.phrase: Flash AI develops investigative software intended to help law-enforcement and public-safety

citation.supported_claim: Flash AI develops investigative software intended to help law-enforcement and public-safety

body_paragraphs.text: I am excited to apply for the AI Engineer position at Flash AI, where I can contribute to developing investigative software that supports law-enforcement and public-safety. Built Python and scikit-learn risk models over SQL data pipelines, raising validated recall by 14% while holding the false-positive rate constant. This experience aligns with the goals of Flash AI to deliver impactful solutions through AI engineering.
body_paragraphs.reason: My background in building risk models demonstrates my ability to enhance predictive accuracy and support investigative workflows.

closing_sentence: I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to Flash AI's mission of supporting law-enforcement and public-safety through innovative AI solutions.
